message:
fix(security): enforce full suffix validation in looksLikeBeadID (GH#3110)

Previously only validated rest[0], leaving suffix unchecked — strings like
gt-a$(cmd) passed despite containing shell metacharacters. Now validates every
character against [a-z0-9.-] with first char must be alphanumeric. 8 new test
cases for shell metacharacter rejection.

Closes #3111

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1190,6 +1190,16 @@ func TestLooksLikeBeadID(t *testing.T) {
 		{"123-abc", false},      // numeric prefix
 		{"a-", false},           // nothing after hyphen
 		{"aaaaaa-b", false},     // prefix too long (6 chars)
+
+		// Shell metacharacters must be rejected (defense-in-depth, GH#3110)
+		{"gt-a$(cmd)", false},
+		{"gt-a;evil", false},
+		{"gt-a|pipe", false},
+		{"gt-a&bg", false},
+		{"gt-a>redir", false},
+		{"gt-a`bt`", false},
+		{"gt-.dot", false},    // leading dot in suffix
+		{"gt--hyphen", false}, // leading hyphen in suffix
 	}
 
 	for _, tt := range tests {
